1157.reason: [The code always creates a new Exp and parses it, even when the initializer list is empty (e.g., "{}"). According to the grammar, the Exp inside the braces is optional. The code should first check if the next token is a right brace before attempting to parse an Exp.]

74.reason: [Error: stepBack(2) should be stepBack(1) because tokens.next() advances the iterator by exactly one position, so stepping back by 2 incorrectly skips an additional token, causing misaligned parsing states and incorrect error line reporting]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: stepBack(2) should be stepBack(1) because tokens.next() advances the iterator by exactly one position, so stepping back by 2 incorrectly skips an additional token, causing misaligned parsing states and incorrect error line reporting]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [stepping back 2 tokens is incorrect because we only consumed 1 token with tokens.next(), this can cause reading from before the current parsing position]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect stepBack amount: should step back only 1 since we just consumed 1 token, stepping back 2 may go beyond available tokens and cause incorrect error line reporting]

3020.reason: Incorrect step back count. Since only one token was consumed by `tokens.next()`, stepping back 2 moves the iterator past the intended position. It should be `stepBack(1)` to correctly reposition the iterator before the current token.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Incorrect step back count. Since only one token was consumed by `tokens.next()`, stepping back 2 moves the iterator past the intended position. It should be `stepBack(1)` to correctly reposition the iterator before the current token.
